description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python Dependency Check that runs on push and pull request events targeting the requirements.txt file. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to test pip installations across multiple Python versions (3.8 to 3.12) and runners (macOS and Ubuntu), excluding macOS-14 for Python 3.8 and 3.9 due to known issues. For each matrix combination, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, and install dependencies from requirements.txt using pip.
